violations.text: Paper menus lacked an allergen statement. PIC notified marketing team during inspection and they are working on reprinting. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Eggplant, which was previously cooked and cooled, was only reheated to 111 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. PIC reheated to 174F. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dried beans. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
Menu board and/or order station does not have an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Falafel batter, prepared today, was observed cooling in the walk-in in container greater than 4 inches. PIC placed in shallow containers. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Working containers of ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. PIC labeled ingredients. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Inspector observed dishwashing staff (employed by facility management) drying dishes with a cloth. Facility management notified. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Food prep sink lacking an air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Facility management called plumber during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
